startup.connecting: 🔌 MediaRaven v{version} — Connecting to Local Server at: {api_url}

prompts.link_detected: 🔗 Link detected You have 5 seconds to choose or I'll start the download.{suffix}
prompts.language_detected: 🌍 Multiple languages detected! You have 10s to choose or I'll download the original.{suffix}
prompts.screenshot_offer:
🖼️ Couldn't extract any media from this link. Send a screenshot of the page instead?

If you don't reply in 5 seconds, I'll send the screenshot.{suffix}

callback_alerts.dl_wrong_user: 🚫 Only the user who sent the link can choose!
callback_alerts.lang_expired: ⚠️ This option expired or the bot already chose on its own.
callback_alerts.lang_wrong_user: 🚫 Only the user who sent the link can choose the language!
callback_alerts.caption_expired: ⚠️ This option expired or was already answered.
callback_alerts.caption_wrong_user: 🚫 Only the user who sent the link can choose the caption!
callback_alerts.screenshot_expired: ⚠️ This option expired or was already answered.
callback_alerts.screenshot_wrong_user: 🚫 Only the user who sent the link can choose!
callback_alerts.retry_wrong_user: 🚫 Only the user who sent the link can retry!

downloader_status.threads_fail: ⚠️ Failed to process this Threads link.
downloader_status.instagram_embed_fail: ⚠️ Failed to extract via Instagram embed.
downloader_status.scraper_fail: ⚠️ No media found on the page.
downloader_status.playwright_not_running: ⚠️ System unavailable right now, please try again in a moment.
